title: PostResponse
description: API response shape for a post. Extends base with resolved/aggregated fields.

authorUsername.description: Username of the post author (resolved at query time)

authorProfilePhoto.description: Profile photo URL of the post author (resolved at query time)

reactionSummary.description: Map of reaction type to count (aggregated at query time)

recentComments.description: Most recent comments on this post (up to 3, resolved at query time)

commentCount.description: Total number of comments on this post (aggregated at query time)

myReaction.description: The current viewer's reaction type, or null if none (resolved at query time)
